name: Procore PC-80HS 80L Dry Cabinet
description: Electric dry cabinet dengan kontrol digital dan layar indikator LED. Kontrol digital berguna untuk melakukan penyetingan kelembaban udara secara otomatis.

features.Key Features:: Rated Power : < 8W | Rated Voltage : 5V - 2A | Capacity: 80 Liter horizontal | Humidity control range: 25% - 60% RH | Digital Dry Cabinet for 80L | Protect valuable products from humidity | High quality LCD panel display | Dimensi Produk : 54 cm x 37 cm x 51 cm
